title: Avoid using backticks for variable names
description: Backticks are used for naming variables in some programming languages, but it is generally discouraged in Python as it may lead to confusion with other languages and could potentially lead to errors.
message: Avoid using backticks for variable names
recommendation: Use underscores or camelCase for variable names
why_is_this_an_issue: Backticks may lead to confusion with other languages and could potentially lead to errors
how_to_fix: Use underscores or camelCase for variable names instead

checks.message: Avoid using backticks in variable assignments
